overall.description: First-person exploration of a medieval gothic classroom with stone walls, wooden beams, and warm candlelight. The video shows high-quality game engine footage from Hogwarts Legacy, featuring the Astronomy Wing classroom with astronomical instruments and a professor NPC.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle classroom entry with grand staircase

events.description: Location text overlay appears identifying the space as The Astronomy Wing (Professor Fig's Classroom)

agents.ego_description: standing near the entrance, slowly panning left to survey the classroom interior and reveal the high vaulted ceiling

entered.detail: grand wooden staircase with ornate railings leading to an upper level
tall wooden shelves overflowing with stacked books and scrolls
large wrought-iron chandeliers with multiple candle-style lights hanging from the vaulted ceiling
gothic stone archway with pointed top framing the far end of the hall
large circular patterned rug at the base of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit gothic classroom entry, showcasing a grand wooden staircase and cluttered bookshelves. The camera slowly pans left, revealing the scale of the vaulted hall with iron chandeliers, while on-screen text identifies the location as Professor Fig's Classroom in the Astronomy Wing.

scene_state.functional_zone: main classroom floor with student desks and fireplace

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the classroom between rows of wooden student tables and benches

entered.detail: long wooden tables with attached benches arranged in rows for students
large red patterned oriental rug covering the central floor area
large stone fireplace with glowing embers set into the far wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward through the main classroom floor, passing between wooden student desks arranged on a large patterned rug. The stone fireplace becomes visible on the left while the chandeliers pass overhead, transitioning from the entry area into the central teaching space.

scene_state.functional_zone: window alcove with astronomical instruments and professor's desk

events.description: Professor NPC becomes visible standing near the back of the classroom by the desk

agents.ego_description: examining the astronomical instrument near the stained glass window, then turning to approach the professor's desk area

notable_agents.action: standing still near the professor's desk at the back of the classroom

entered.detail: tall gothic stained glass windows with dark blue and purple panes showing night sky
large brass telescope or orrery positioned near the window for astronomical observation
large ornate wooden desk with papers and magical artifacts on the far side of the room

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a side alcove featuring tall stained glass windows and a brass astronomical instrument, then turns back toward the main hall. As the view opens up, a professor NPC becomes visible standing near the wooden desk at the far end of the classroom, completing the survey of the astronomy classroom.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit gothic classroom that expands from a cluttered entryway into a grand, instrument-filled teaching hall. It begins by panning across a grand wooden staircase and vaulted ceilings adorned with iron chandeliers, establishing the scale of the Astronomy Wing. As the camera moves forward, the view transitions from the entry area into the central space, gliding past wooden student desks arranged on a large patterned rug and a stone fireplace. The scene then shifts into a side alcove featuring tall stained glass windows and a brass astronomical instrument before turning back toward the main hall. Finally, the perspective opens up to reveal a professor standing by a wooden desk at the far end of the room, completing the survey of the environment.
